title: Pattern Comparison Analysis
description: Compare different real-time patterns and choose the best one for different scenarios.
instructions:
Analyze the following scenarios and determine the best real-time pattern for each:

1. Stock price ticker that updates every second
2. Multiplayer game requiring instant player synchronization
3. Blog comment system that updates when new comments arrive
4. Live sports scoreboard with play-by-play updates

For each scenario:
- Identify the key requirements (latency, directionality, scale)
- Compare polling, SSE, and WebSockets
- Justify your choice with pros/cons
- Consider fallback strategies

hints.text: Consider whether communication is one-way (server→client) or two-way when choosing a pattern.
For high-frequency updates (>1 per second), WebSockets are usually more efficient than polling.
Think about battery life and data usage on mobile devices when comparing approaches.
